item.title: Trump admin to repeal Obama-era greenhouse gas finding in large-scale deregulation
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration is set to reverse a 2009 greenhouse gas finding in what EPA chief calls "largest deregulation" in U.S. history...

item.title: Iran draws missile red line as analysts warn Tehran is stalling US talks
item.description: Iran rejects U.S. demands to negotiate ballistic missile program as tensions escalate across Middle East despite ongoing diplomatic talks in Oman.

item.title: Senate races to avert third shutdown as DHS deal takes shape
item.description: Department of Homeland Security faces a potential shutdown affecting TSA, FEMA and the Coast Guard, as Senate Democrats push for immigration enforceme...

item.title: As Ukraine war drags on, Trump hits Putin by squeezing Russia’s proxies
item.description: President Donald Trump threatened "very severe consequences" on Russia in 2025 if Moscow didn't end Ukraine war, pressuring Russian allies Iran and Ve...

item.title: Adam Schiff makes endorsement in California gubernatorial race
item.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California is backing his House Democratic colleague Rep. Eric Swalwell in the Golden State governor's race.
